textAreas.label: Text
textAreas.text:
Strategic Intent

Our Strategic Intent is to transition Neurovi from a localized, custom-deployed monolith into an API-first, multi-tenant SaaS platform that elevates the entire healthcare ecosystem. We will achieve this by executing against these Four Strategic Goals:

1. Re-architecturing (The Technical Foundation)
System Modularity & Data Ownership: Breaking the monolith into independent, decoupled microservices situated behind an API Gateway and SSO layer. Each independent service has clear ownership of its data, significantly simplifying storage and transmission management while unlocking powerful analytical use cases—from in-app analytics to building comprehensive Data Warehouses for Business Intelligence.
Security-First Architecture: Implementing an integrated compliance framework with a centralized Security Engine and Role-Based Authentication Service. Every transaction includes strict data ingestion tracking, immutable audit trails, and detailed activity access logs.
Improve System Performance: Utilizing modern cloud infrastructure and an API Gateway for high availability and speed.
Maintain Data Integrity: Shifting transactional data to PostgreSQL and routing inter-module communication through an Enterprise Service Bus (ESB). Routing inter-module communication through a robust Integrations Layer utilizing an Enterprise Service Bus (Kafka) and REST APIs. Data is persisted in a segmented Storage Layer utilizing highly available PostgreSQL databases, Object Storage, and Cache.
Update Agility: Enabling CI/CD pipelines so we can push updates to all tenant hospitals simultaneously without breaking core flows.

2. Re-definition (The Business & User Value)
Improve User Experience: Revamping the current UX by learning from modern industry standards to drastically reduce cognitive load and ambiguity. The system is designed to be highly familiar and intuitive, empowering Health Practitioners to easily self-learn and operate the platform without needing lengthy, expensive training sessions.
Single Branch & System Configuration: Moving to a true multi-tenant SaaS model utilizing a single codebase branch for all clients. All differing operational flows and use cases will be fully configurable via a centralized Control Panel and Super Admin system. (For example, enabling Hospital A to use "Moving Average" for drug pricing while Hospital B configures it to "Highest" or "Latest", all on the same software branch).
System Configuration: Building dynamic, robust configuration engines to eliminate the need for custom coding.
Improve Hospital Business Performance: Providing actionable revenue cycle management, leak-prevention in billing, and optimized inventory workflows. 
3. Complete the Features (Product Parity & Beyond)
Closing all existing functional gaps from V1. V2 will not just be faster; it will be a comprehensive, uncompromising superset of capabilities required to run a modern hospital.

4. Improve Integration (The Connected Ecosystem)
Increase Quality of Care: Building seamless, native integrations with clinical support systems (RIS - Radiology, LIS - Laboratory, PACS - Imaging).
Increase Hospital Integration: Hardcoding compliance and operational flow with Kemenkes SATUSEHAT and BPJS Services (VClaim, Antrean, PCare, Eklaim).
Improve Patient Experience: Extending Neurovi's boundaries outside the hospital walls via an integrated Online Registration Website and Patient Portal/Apps.

textAreas.label: Text
textAreas.text:
Internal FAQ
Q: Will we force our existing V1 hospitals to switch to V2 overnight? 
A: No. We are using a 24-month "Strangler Fig" migration strategy. We are building a powerful Data Synchronization Tool to mirror data between the Legacy MongoDB and the new V2 PostgreSQL in real-time. Hospitals will be migrated module-by-module seamlessly.

Q: If a major client demands a custom UI workflow, do we build it? 
A: No. We sell them on the efficiency, security, and beauty of the standard V2 workflow. If a feature is genuinely missing, we address it under Product Principle 3 ("Complete the Features") and add it to the core product roadmap for all tenants.

Q: How does this rewrite actually "Improve Hospital Business Performance"? 
A: By ensuring 100% data integrity via the ESB, we stop revenue leakage (e.g., medicine dispensed but not billed). Furthermore, our dynamic Master Tarif engine ensures the hospital always maximizes its BPJS and Insurance claims without manual, error-prone data entry.

Q: What is the primary metric the CPO will use to judge the success of this rewrite? 
A: Time-to-Value (TTV) and Adoption. Our ultimate goal is reducing the time it takes from signing a contract to a hospital processing their first live BPJS claim on Neurovi from 3 months down to under 14 days, while simultaneously seeing high adoption rates of our new Patient Portal and LIS/PACS integrations.

textAreas.label: Body
textAreas.text:
Diagram information
Diagram ini menggambarkan alur registrasi pasien di Instalasi Gawat Darurat (IGD) menggunakan Sistem Informasi Manajemen Rumah Sakit (SIMRS). Dimulai dari kedatangan pasien, identifikasi status baru/lama, pengisian atau pencarian data pasien, pemilihan penjaminan (BPJS/Asuransi/Umum), pengecekan keaktifan BPJS dan penerbitan SEP bila diperlukan, penyimpanan registrasi, masuk antrean dan pencetakan nomor antrean, serta berbagai aksi operasional (check-in, ekspor data, lihat data sosial, cetak dokumen, manajemen SEP, pembatalan registrasi). Komponen utama: Pasien, Petugas Pendaftaran IGD, Admin, proses identifikasi, input/pencarian data, modul penjaminan (termasuk cek BPJS dan bridging VClaim untuk SEP), antrean SIMRS, dan tindakan operasional yang dapat mengubah atau membatalkan registrasi.

SOP Registrasi Pasien IGD (SIMRS)
1. Mulai proses saat Pasien datang ke IGD.
2. Petugas identifikasi status pasien (baru atau lama).
	2.1. Jika pasien baru, petugas klik Tambah (+) dan input data pasien baru.
	2.2. Jika pasien lama, petugas cari pasien menggunakan No RM / NIK / Nama.
3. Setelah data pasien tersedia, petugas pilih penjaminan (BPJS / Asuransi / Umum).
4. Jika penjaminan BPJS dipilih, SIMRS cek status keaktifan kartu BPJS.
	4.1. Jika kartu BPJS tidak aktif, petugas ubah penjaminan atau lengkapi data, lalu kembali ke pemilihan penjaminan.
	4.2. Jika kartu BPJS aktif, lanjut ke langkah berikutnya.
5. Petugas pilih jenis layanan (Klinik / Penunjang / Penunjang+Klinik) dan tentukan poli/klinik jika layanan klinik dipilih.
6. Jika diperlukan SEP untuk BPJS, terbitkan SEP melalui bridging SIMRS dengan VClaim.
7. Simpan registrasi di SIMRS.
8. Masukkan pasien ke antrean di SIMRS.
9. Cetak nomor antrean untuk pasien.
10. Lakukan aksi operasional sesuai kebutuhan:
	10.1. Check-in: catat waktu kedatangan (termasuk via APM).
	10.2. Export data sesuai permintaan.
	10.3. Lihat atau ubah data sosial (akses terbatas berdasarkan role).
	10.4. Print dokumen terkait.
	10.5. Manajemen SEP bila SEP belum terbit atau perlu koreksi.
	10.6. Jika Admin memilih untuk membatalkan pasien, lanjut ke pembatalan registrasi.
11. Jika registrasi dibatalkan, batalkan registrasi di SIMRS.
12. Setelah pembatalan, update antrean untuk merefleksikan perubahan.
13. Proses selesai ketika pasien telah dicheck-in dan/atau layanan diproses atau registrasi dibatalkan.

penggunaan oksigen tanggung jawab dari farmasi
perhitungan penggunaan per item
 HPP dan HNA bukan di master data
 Pendetailan data yg berubah di setiap proses di Modul
 Locking Farmasi tetap mengurangi stok saat konfirmasi, namun terdapat buffer stok (penguran stok) saat order tersimpan
 Menambahkan konfig untuk pengurangan stok saat order resep. (i) pengurangan stok saat order, (ii) pengurangan stok saat konfirmasi order
 Sistem billing tidak perlu ada retur, jika ada retur perlu dikembalikan informasi ke farmasi. sistem memfasilitasi alur request perubahan obat ke farmasi
 Lock Tagihan - Secara konsep, semua tagihan yang sudah pelunasan, tidak dapat di batal lunaskan
 Penerimaan Barang ada 3 kondisi, (i) diretur dengan barang yang sama, (ii) diretur dengan barang dengan nilai yang sama, (iii) di retur dengan bentuk uang. perlu di akomodir
 memberikan opsi untuk pada sistem untuk mengeksesuki ketidaksesuaian antara faktur dan barang yg diterima: i. lewat opsi retur, ii. tambah faktur, iii. refund uang, iv.
